div.head: Inhabitants of Halstead
div.p: His Excellency C. F. Adams, London:

We, the undersigned, inhabitants of Halstead, Essex, England, desire to express our deep horror and regret that the President of the United States has been deprived of life by an act of violence, and our sympathy with the citizens of the United States in the great loss they have sustained.

postscript.p: Forwarded by R. L. Hughes, proprietor of the “Halstead Times.”
